children.heading: Enrollment of ineligible child in system school
children.label: a Enrollment of ineligible child in system school
children.text: Subject to subsection (b) and in accordance with regulations issued under subsection (c), the Director may authorize the enrollment in a school of the defense dependents’ education system of a child not otherwise eligible to enroll in such a school if and to the extent that there is space available for such child in the school.

children.heading: Determination of amount of tuition; use of payments
children.label: b Determination of amount of tuition; use of payments

children.text: Except as otherwise provided under subsection (c), any child permitted to enroll in a school of the defense dependents’ education system under this section shall be required to pay tuition at a rate determined by the Secretary of Defense, which shall not be less than the rate necessary to defray the average cost of the enrollment of children in the system under this section.
Amounts received under paragraph (1) shall be available to the defense dependents’ education system to assist in defraying the cost of enrollment of children in the system under this section.

The Secretary of Defense may by regulation identify classes of children who shall be eligible to enroll in schools of the defense dependents’ education system under this section if and to the extent that there is space available, establish priorities among such classes, waive the tuition requirement of subsection (b)(1) with respect to any such class, and issue such other regulations as may be necessary to carry out this section.

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary shall include in the regulations prescribed under this subsection a requirement that children in the class of children described in subparagraph (B) shall be subject to the same tuition requirements, or waiver of tuition requirements, as children in the class of children described in subparagraph (C).

children.label: i
children.text: are on active duty under an order to active duty under section 12301 or 12302 of title 10;

children.label: ii
children.text: were ordered to active duty from a location in the United States (other than in Alaska or Hawaii); and

children.label: iii
children.text: are serving on active duty outside the United States or in Alaska or Hawaii.

children.label: i
children.text: are on active duty under an order to active duty under section 12301 or 12302 of title 10;

children.label: ii
children.text: were ordered to active duty from a location outside the United States (or in Alaska or Hawaii); and

children.label: iii
children.text: are serving on active duty outside the United States or in Alaska or Hawaii.

children.heading: Enrollment of certain children in overseas schools
children.label: d Enrollment of certain children in overseas schools
A
children.text: Children of officers and employees of the United States (other than civilian officers and employees who are sponsors under ) stationed in overseas areas.section 932(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Children of employees of contractors employed in carrying out work for the United States in overseas areas.

children.label: C
children.text: Children of other citizens or nationals of the United States or of foreign nationals, if the Secretary determines that enrollment of such children is in the national interest.

children.label: i
children.text: are performing, on a full-time basis, services for the Armed Forces, including emergency services; and

children.label: ii
children.text: reside in an overseas area supported by a school of the defense dependents’ education system.
Notwithstanding subsection (c), the Secretary may not waive the tuition requirements of subsection (b)(1) with respect to children referred to in paragraph (1).
